mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_training_plan_subject_courses WHERE comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{coursesId} IS NULL or #{coursesId} = '' THEN TO_CHAR(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(courses_Id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text , 4, '0') ELSE #{coursesId} END as coursesId FROM esg.tb_training_plan_subject_courses WHERE courses_Id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%' AND comp_id = #{compId} LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_plan_subject_courses ( comp_id, courses_id, courses_nm, remark, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{coursesId}, #{coursesNm}, #{remark}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_training_plan_subject_courses SET courses_nm = #{coursesNm}, remark = #{remark}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = 'N' WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND courses_id = #{coursesId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_training_plan_training_center WHERE comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{centerId} IS NULL or #{centerId} = '' THEN TO_CHAR(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(center_Id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text , 4, '0') ELSE #{centerId} END as centerId FROM esg.tb_training_plan_training_center WHERE center_id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%' AND comp_id = #{compId} LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_plan_training_center ( comp_id, center_id, center_nm, remark, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{centerId}, #{centerNm}, #{remark}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_training_plan_training_center SET center_nm = #{centerNm}, remark = #{remark}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = 'N' WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND center_id = #{centerId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_training_plan_instructor WHERE comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{instructorId} IS NULL or #{instructorId} = '' THEN TO_CHAR(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(instructor_Id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text , 4, '0') ELSE #{instructorId} END as instructor_id FROM esg.tb_training_plan_instructor WHERE instructor_id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%' AND comp_id = #{compId} LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_plan_instructor ( comp_id, instructor_id, instructor_nm, remark, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{instructorId}, #{instructorNm}, #{remark}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_training_plan_instructor SET instructor_nm = #{instructorNm}, remark = #{remark}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = 'N' WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND instructor_id = #{instructorId}
mapper.select: SELECT ttpi.*, ttpal.hr_id, thi.hr_nm, toi.orgn_nm, thij.jbrp_nm, ttpsc.courses_nm as trainingTypeNm, ttptc.center_nm as trainingInstituteNm, ttpinst.instructor_nm as trainingInstructorNm FROM esg.tb_training_plan_annual ttpi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_subject_courses ttpsc ON ttpsc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpsc.courses_id = ttpi.training_course LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_center ttptc ON ttptc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttptc.center_id = ttpi.training_institute LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_instructor ttpinst ON ttpinst.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpinst.instructor_id = ttpi.training_instructor LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_annual_learner ttpal on ttpi.write_year = ttpal.write_year and ttpi.doc_no = ttpal.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON ttpal.hr_id = thi.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON thi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp thij ON toi.comp_id = thij.comp_id AND thi.jbrp = thij.jbrp_id WHERE ttpi.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttpi.write_year = #{writeYear} ORDER BY ttpi.use_yn DESC, ttpi.ord_seq, ttpi.doc_no DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_training_plan_annual WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_plan_annual ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, training_course, training_duration, training_institute, training_instructor, training_month1, training_month2, training_month3, training_month4, training_month5, training_month6, training_month7, training_month8, training_month9, training_month10, training_month11, training_month12, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{trainingCourse}, #{trainingDuration}, #{trainingInstitute}, #{trainingInstructor}, #{trainingMonth1}, #{trainingMonth2}, #{trainingMonth3}, #{trainingMonth4}, #{trainingMonth5}, #{trainingMonth6}, #{trainingMonth7}, #{trainingMonth8}, #{trainingMonth9}, #{trainingMonth10}, #{trainingMonth11}, #{trainingMonth12}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_training_plan_annual SET training_course = #{trainingCourse}, training_duration = #{trainingDuration}, training_institute = #{trainingInstitute}, training_instructor = #{trainingInstructor}, training_month1 = #{trainingMonth1}, training_month2 = #{trainingMonth2}, training_month3 = #{trainingMonth3}, training_month4 = #{trainingMonth4}, training_month5 = #{trainingMonth5}, training_month6 = #{trainingMonth6}, training_month7 = #{trainingMonth7}, training_month8 = #{trainingMonth8}, training_month9 = #{trainingMonth9}, training_month10 = #{trainingMonth10}, training_month11 = #{trainingMonth11}, training_month12 = #{trainingMonth12}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE comp_id = #{compId} AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type = #{docType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_plan_annual_learner ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, hr_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{hrId}, NOW(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT ttpa.*, jbrp.jbrp_nm FROM esg.tb_training_instructor ttpa left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = vhi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ttpa.use_yn DESC, ttpa.instructor_id DESC
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(instructor_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as instructor_id from esg.tb_training_instructor where instructor_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' and comp_id = #{compId}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_instructor ( instructor_id, comp_id, instructor_nm, jbrp, sex_div, birth_dt, email, phone, zip_cd, addrs1, addrs2, remark, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{instructorId}, #{compId}, #{instructorNm}, #{jbrp}, #{sexDiv}, #{birthDt}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{zipCd}, #{addrs1}, #{addrs2}, #{remark}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_training_instructor SET instructor_nm = #{instructorNm}, jbrp = #{jbrp}, sex_div = #{sexDiv}, birth_dt = #{birthDt}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, zip_cd = #{zipCd}, addrs1 = #{addrs1}, addrs2 = #{addrs2}, remark = #{remark}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE instructor_id = #{instructorId}
mapper.select: SELECT ttpi.*, ttpal.hr_id, thi.hr_nm, toi.orgn_nm, thij.jbrp_nm, ttpsc.courses_nm as trainingTypeNm, ttptc.center_nm as trainingInstituteNm, ttpinst.instructor_nm as trainingInstructorNm FROM esg.tb_training_plan_annual ttpi LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_subject_courses ttpsc ON ttpsc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpsc.courses_id = ttpi.training_course LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_training_center ttptc ON ttptc.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttptc.center_id = ttpi.training_institute LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_instructor ttpinst ON ttpinst.comp_id = ttpi.comp_id AND ttpinst.instructor_id = ttpi.training_instructor LEFT JOIN esg.tb_training_plan_annual_learner ttpal on ttpi.write_year = ttpal.write_year and ttpi.doc_no = ttpal.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON ttpal.hr_id = thi.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON thi.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp thij ON toi.comp_id = thij.comp_id AND thi.jbrp = thij.jbrp_id WHERE ttpi.comp_id = #{compId} AND ttpi.write_year = #{writeYear} ORDER BY ttpi.use_yn DESC, ttpi.ord_seq, ttpi.doc_no DESC
select t1.doc_no from esg.tb_training_plan_annual t1 where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
